items.summary: Overlay buy/sell signal markers directly on the candlestick chart canvas. For each candle where a BUY signal is detected, render a green upward-pointing arrow below the candle's low wick. For each candle where a SELL signal is detected, render a red downward-pointing arrow above the candle's high wick. Each arrow must include a small label showing the dominant pattern name (e.g., 'Hammer', 'Engulfing') and the confidence score (e.g., '78%'). Markers must be drawn as part of the existing CandlestickChart canvas rendering pipeline so they pan and zoom in sync with the candles.
